title: AN ACT DECLARING MARCH 17 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALAMBAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO COMMEMORATE THE DEATH ANNIVERSARY OF PRESIDENT RAMON B. MAGSAYSAY, SR.

chunks.text:
h. No. 7523 / 97 OG No. 31, 4554 (July 30, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9088, April 08, 2001 ]

AN ACT DECLARING MARCH 17 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALAMBAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU TO COMMEMORATE THE DEATH ANNIVERSARY OF PRESIDENT RAMON B. MAGSAYSAY, SR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In commemoration of the death anniversary of President Ramon B. Magsaysay Sr. in Mount Manunggal, Balamban, Cebu, March 17 of every year is hereby declared as a special working holiday in the Municipality of Balamban, Province of Cebu.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 6, 2000 and October 2, 2001, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 08, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
